equivalence_argument: The port has a helper that can fetch previous header data, but the audited block-execution and block-verification paths do not extract block SPC calls into requests by calling that helper for spc_call.block_number - 1 or fail execution on header lookup failure.

checked_queries: SPC requests use real previous headers
extract SPC calls from block previous header lookup
Previous block header not found abort block execution
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No audited block-execution path converts block SPC calls into verification requests using freshly fetched previous-header hash/timestamp data or fails block execution when that header lookup is missing.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs verifies SPC signatures using previous_block_hash/number/timestamp stored in AsyncJobTracker job data, not by fetching headers while extracting block SPC calls.
crates/node/src/executor.rs injects transaction spc_calls into async context but does not build SpcVerificationRequest values from real previous headers.

notes: Confirmed gap; current v2 verification relies on AsyncJobTracker-stored previous block metadata instead of the Atlas-described extraction-time header fetch.
rationale: The primary diff replaces placeholder parent metadata with a two-pass extraction that collects unique previous block numbers, fetches header metadata via get_previous_block_data, and aborts on missing header data. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When extracting SPC calls from a block, only HTTP-call SPC entries are converted into verification requests, each must have an executor address extractable from the SPC input, and each request must use real previous-block hash and timestamp data fetched through the SPC verifier for spc_call.block_number - 1; header lookup failure must fail block execution.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create a block with HTTP SPC calls from two different referenced block numbers, mock get_previous_block_data to return known metadata, and assert each request contains the matching previous hash/timestamp; then make one lookup fail and assert block execution errors.
summary: SPC block-call extraction does not fetch real previous headers during execution.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Mock SpcVerifier::get_previous_block_data to fail for an SPC call referenced block and execute a block; current code has no extraction path that would call the mock and abort execution for the missing header.
title: SPC requests use real previous headers
